name: Stronger
description: Have you been working out? +1 Strength per level.

name: Even Stronger
description: You HAVE been working out. +2 Strength per level.

name: Faster
description: Have you been doing cardio? +1 Dexterity per level.

name: Even Faster
description: You HAVE been doing cardio. +2 Dexterity per level.

name: Smarter
description: Have you been reading? +1 Intelligence per level.

name: Even Smarter
description: You HAVE been reading. +2 Intelligence per level.

name: Sharper
description: Have you been staring out into the middle distance? +1 Perception per level.

name: Even Sharper
description: You HAVE been staring out into the middle distance. +2 Perception per level.

name: Mighty Thews
description: Your rippling muscles enable you to split the skulls of your enemies. +5% to Lifting and Grip.

name: Pantherish Grace
description: Your movements bring to mind a multitude of cat-based metaphors. +5% to Balance and Footing.

name: Eagle Eyes
description: Your sharp gazes misses little. +25% to Vision and Night Vision.

name: Thick Skull
description: You've taken so many blows to the head you've lost count. Additional skull armor.

name: Built Tough
description: You're like a walking tank! Take 5% less damage from all sources.

name: Hauler
description: All that hauling has paid off. You can carry 10kg of additional items.

name: Vacationer
description: Every day in the apocalypse is just like the beach. You are more comfortable in cold and warm weather.

name: Gym Rat
description: Your time exercising has gotten you used to being drenched in your own sweat. Being wet doesn't bother you as much.

name: Quickdraw
description: Practicing with handguns has improved your draw speed. Retrieve objects 25% faster from containers.

name: Animal Friend
description: Even with everything that's happened, you still find solace in nature. Natural animals are less likely to attack you.

name: Vengeful
description: Oh, they're not getting away with THAT. You do +15% damage for two turns after you're hit.

name: Twice Shy
description: Pain is really painful; best to avoid it. For five turns after you are hit, you gain +1 bonus dodge.

name: Grit Your Teeth
description: When you have to you can wipe the blood off your chin, grit your teeth, and get it done. Use to reduce your pain.

name: Second Wind
description: Anyone can pause and catch their breath but you're extremely good at doing so. Regenerate stamina periodically.

name: Slippery Escape
description: Your joints are flexible enough that you can twist out of nearly anything. At the cost of some pain.

name: Surgical Strikes
description: Careful aim allows you to take down game with little tissue damage.

name: Bloody Mess
description: For whatever reason you seem to always make a real mess of things.

name: Perfect Timing
description: You used to annoy your friends before the Cataclysm by always being *exactly* on time.

name: All Terrain
description: You have a persistent sense of how to move around in sharp and rough terrain.

name: Jumpy
description: You've not been the same since the apocalypse, almost everything makes you jump.

name: Quick Recovery
description: You get knocked down, but you get up again. 75% chance to stand up when downed.

name: Easy Sleeper
description: You've always been able to fall asleep within a few minutes of closing your eyes.

name: Running in Heels
description: You have mastered the ways of the 90s action heroine. Heels only encumber you as much as normal shoes.

name: Duck and Weave
description: Run without rhythm. After a short wind-up period, you gain dodge bonus as long as you keep running.

name: Hobbyist
description: No work, no social obligations, lots of time to focus on your hobbies. You feel like you've been picking up skills faster.

name: Non-Combatant
description: Hey, that's against the Geneva Convention! When completely unarmed, you take -25% reduced damage.

name: Hemophage
description: You do not drink…wine. You are immune to the negative consequences of drinking blood.

name: Red rage
description: You hate the feeling of your blood leaking so much that it empowers you. You deal more melee damage when bleeding.

name: Peer pressure
description: You know how to leverage your allies' presence when talking with others.
